carryover_to_2b.3.2: Consume ExecuteSplitAllocateAndWrite's returned map[NewPath]fileID to create catalog records (status REDIRECT/SPLIT, RedirectTargetIDs) without re-deriving fileIDs.

Non-blocking hardening suggestions (not required for 2b.3.1 acceptance): add a test for zero-length range touching a non-zero range's boundary across two proposals; consider a defensive comment/assert in extractSections if it's ever reused outside the validated call path.
